feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 96,821Chapters: 64/?Kudos: 32

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

  • Major Character Death

entry.title: Lashes
entry.summary:
Author: LoverofMidnight

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 300Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: The guards pushed him down onto his knees, arms forced forward, shackled to the table. He took a deep breath; thirty lashes were going to be hell. But he would be able to live.

entry.title: Two sides of the same coin
entry.summary:
Author: dust_under_the_wardrobe

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,664Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 119

Summary: Arthur was born of magic. Merlin was born magic. Merlin was born because of Arthur. Merlin was born FOR Arthur. Everything he'd ever done and will do, was and will be for Arthur. Always.   What happens when Arthur starts to appreciate Merlin and his efforts? What happens, when their emotions run wild and they won't be able to hold them back anymore? What happens when Merlin and Arthur finally give in to their desires and accept their true destiny: to be two sides of the same coin?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 44,071Chapters: 14/55Kudos: 91

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon’s protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon’s curse begins to stir — and Uther Pendragon’s madness stands as a warning — Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Touch Of Love
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,362Chapters: 3/5Kudos: 132

Summary: Merlin's eyes changed when he did magic. He knew that. In the privacy of his own head, Arthur had come to think of that golden gleam as beautiful since he'd discovered the secret of his sorcery. This was different. It crackled like lightning; a storm held in Merlin's gaze. It cast brief light upon his cheekbones, spilling odd shadows across his face. 'What's happening?' 'He is dying,' a woman's voice said, sugar-sweet. 'And he will take you with him, Arthur Pendragon.' --- A routine hunt threatens to become a fatal disaster when Arthur and Merlin are captured and imprisoned in a dungeon used during the Purge. Can they fight their way to freedom, or will Merlin's power be the death of them?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Captivity
  • Hurt/Comfort
  • Naked magical healing

entry.title: Lonely Bird
entry.summary:
Author: gloriask

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,773Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 91

Summary: Where the birth of a child and the death of a beloved occupy the same instant. Arthur held them. Both of them. The living and the dead. His son and his husband. The beginning and the end.

entry.title: Three Teardrops
entry.summary:
Author: grlnxtdr29

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,883Chapters: 13/14Kudos: 33

Summary: The Search for the Dragon Eggs continues in this sequel to Of Legends and (Rugby) Kings. Now that Charlie and the Paris Squad are starting to remember their past, it is time to focus on helping the Sorcerer complete his Quest to restore the Dragon Race, and bring Magick back to the world. Along the way, they will encounter old foes, and new ones, while discovering things about themselves they never realized before. There will be memories of Camelot, and perhaps even some surprises along the way!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: SEASON 1: EPISODE 2: DARKEST DAYS FULL AUDIO BOOK
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 37Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: The road to healing is never smooth. Merlin faces his greatest challenge, and Arthur needs to make another choice- to let him fall into darkness, or bring him back to the light. entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,001,931Chapters: 129/?Kudos: 1,645

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Carry on, Wayward Pendragons
entry.summary:
Author: Salamandair

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,967Chapters: 24/24Kudos: 4

Summary: Arthur and Morgana are Hunters, people that hunt and kill supernatural creatures. The same creatures that killed their mother and then their father. They’re thick as thieves, close as siblings can get. but when Morgana begins to show signs of magic, things change between the two. But when Morgana dies on a hunt shortly after, Arthur makes a deal that will change their lives forever. [Writen for RVBB 2026]

entry.title: A Little Hollow But Not Anymore
entry.summary:
Author: Unsolved_Adelaide

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,139Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 33

Summary: After narrowly escaping an assassination attempt by the Sarrum, Arthur refuses to let go of the whole "My manservant ditched me to be with some girl for days" thing and pesters Merlin about the details. The answer he gets isn't what he expected but Merlin is the one who gets the shock of the lifetime.

entry.title: Stay alive
entry.summary:
Author: Sunflower_Agency

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,573Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Uther finds out about Merlin's magic and orders his execution. His friends are not having that and help him escape from Camelot. As long as Uther is king he cannot come back, but that will not stop him from doing everything in his power to protect Arthur from the distance. Or: the series but Merlin is on the run as we give him: - a very long distance homoerotic situationship - a bounty on his head - more quality time with his dad - a cool dragon

entry.title: Magical Mayhem
entry.summary:
Author: SyphontheNightFury

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,671Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 8

Summary: Everyone knows the stories. About the Golden Kingdom of Camelot, Her Just King Arthur, and his Wondrous Magician, Merlin. There are many renditions of this beloved tale, and yet, there are still Questions. 'What if Arthur had met the dragon first' for example...

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,508Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: a pity she does not exist
entry.summary:
Author: tox_47

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,815Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Then Merlin’s body started morphing. He looked in horror, the knights seemed shocked and hesitant, what had the witch done to him? His body shrank, his hair lengthened and in a short period of time, perhaps seconds, it stopped. Merlin looked different...his body didn’t melt or do anything strange like he feared. But, it was weird and Arthur couldn’t believe what was in front of his eyes. Inexplicably, the witch’s spell had turned his manservant into a woman!   Or; in order to teach arthur some empathy for the marginalized, a witch attempts to turn him into a woman, but merlin gets hit instead. They deal with the new dynamic and learn somethings about themselves.

entry.title: Courting the Court Sorcerer
entry.summary:
Author: Harmon_A

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,422Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 12

Summary: It had been a year or so now, since the magic ban had been reversed, months since Merlin became Court Sorcerer. And a few more weeks since Merlin's injury. Arthur had finally given Merlin the Court-Sorcerer chambers he was promised, that just happened to be down the hall from the kings own . Arthur would insist this was not on purpose, but everyone had seen them around the castle, holding and kissing each others hands, teasing each other as usual but with the addition of grinning at each other. There had been a shift in their relationship, and it meant they were more protective of each other than usual. If it wasn't terrifying, it would probably be sweet. But of course this is Camelot, not everything can stay perfect for too long. Destiny would never allow it. --------------------------- A continuation from the previous fic in this series. (read if you want context for Merlin's injury or their realtionship, but not needed)Merlin and Arthur begin courting, Merlin knows nothing about noble courting rules, Arthur will do anything to protect Merlin.
